title: Dynamic Trees - Biomes O' Plenty
description: Compatibility Mod between Dynamic trees and Biomes O' Plenty
body:
![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/918/257/biomesoplenty.png)

[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3) [![Forge](https://i.imgur.com/oeSBh9T.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)

## Overview
This mod makes Biomes O' Plenty compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of trees added by it, and fully replacing them during world generation.
The trees, their behavior and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs.

## Features
### New Trees
- Palm
- Orange Autumn
- Yellow Autumn
- Maple
- Dying Trees
- Dead Trees
- Burnt Trees
- Flowering Oak
- Jacaranda
- Rainbow Birch
- Pink Cherry
- White Cherry
- Hellbark
- Willow
- Fir
- Mahogany
- Redwood
- Umbran
- Magic Tree
- Dark Poplar
- Spruce Poplar

### New Mushrooms (If [Dynamic Trees +](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreesplus) is installed):
- Toadstool
- Glowshroom

### Trees that will not be replaced
- Origin Oak (classic look)
- Mangrove (theres no mangrove wood)

## Other addons
Addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) page.
### Suggestions and Requests
To request a new mod for compatibility please do it [Github Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions).

## Requirements
- [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- Optionally, [Dynamic Trees Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees)

## License, Permission and Modpacks
Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask.
This mod has an MIT license and its source is public on github.
